# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

interface EdgeConfigData {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS?: {
    enableNewUI?: boolean;
    enableAnalytics?: boolean;
    enableBetaFeatures?: boolean;
  };
  RATE_LIMIT?: {
    maxRequests?: number;
    windowMs?: number;
  };
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    enableNewUI: false,
    enableAnalytics: true,
    enableBetaFeatures: false,
  },
  RATE_LIMIT: {
    maxRequests: 100,
    windowMs: 60000,
  },
};

const ALLOWED_ORIGINS = [
  'https://yourdomain.com',
  'https://www.yourdomain.com',
];

const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetTime: number }>();

function sanitizeUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const parsed = new URL(url);
    if (!['postgresql:', 'postgres:', 'mysql:', 'https:', 'http:'].includes(parsed.protocol)) {
      return DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL;
    }
    return url;
  } catch {
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL;
  }
}

function sanitizeApiKey(key: string): string {
  const sanitized = key.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/g, '');
  return sanitized.length > 0 ? sanitized : DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY;
}

function checkRateLimit(ip: string, maxRequests: number, windowMs: number): boolean {
  const now = Date.now();
  const record = rateLimitMap.get(ip);

  if (!record || now > record.resetTime) {
    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetTime: now + windowMs });
    return true;
  }

  if (record.count >= maxRequests) {
    return false;
  }

  record.count++;
  return true;
}

function getClientIp(request: NextRequest): string {
  const forwarded = request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for');
  const realIp = request.headers.get('x-real-ip');
  
  if (forwarded) {
    return forwarded.split(',')[0].trim();
  }
  
  if (realIp) {
    return realIp;
  }
  
  return 'unknown';
}

function validateOrigin(request: NextRequest): boolean {
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  
  if (!origin) {
    return true;
  }
  
  return ALLOWED_ORIGINS.includes(origin);
}

async function getEdgeConfig(): Promise<EdgeConfigData> {
  try {
    if (!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
      console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG not set, using defaults');
      return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
    }

    const config = await get<EdgeConfigData>('config');
    
    if (!config) {
      console.warn('No config found in Edge Config, using defaults');
      return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
    }

    return {
      API_KEY: config.API_KEY ? sanitizeApiKey(config.API_KEY) : DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: config.DB_URL ? sanitizeUrl(config.DB_URL) : DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAGS: {
        enableNewUI: config.FEATURE_FLAGS?.enableNewUI ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS.enableNewUI,
        enableAnalytics: config.FEATURE_FLAGS?.enableAnalytics ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS.enableAnalytics,
        enableBetaFeatures: config.FEATURE_FLAGS?.enableBetaFeatures ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS.enableBetaFeatures,
      },
      RATE_LIMIT: {
        maxRequests: config.RATE_LIMIT?.maxRequests ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.RATE_LIMIT.maxRequests,
        windowMs: config.RATE_LIMIT?.windowMs ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.RATE_LIMIT.windowMs,
      },
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching Edge Config:', error);
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

function maskSensitiveData(data: EdgeConfigData): Partial<EdgeConfigData> {
  return {
    API_KEY: data.API_KEY ? `${data.API_KEY.substring(0, 8)}...` : undefined,
    DB_URL: data.DB_URL ? data.DB_URL.replace(/\/\/[^@]+@/, '//***:***@') : undefined,
    FEATURE_FLAGS: data.FEATURE_FLAGS,
    RATE_LIMIT: data.RATE_LIMIT,
  };
}

export default async function handler(request: NextRequest) {
  const clientIp = getClientIp(request);
  
  if (!validateOrigin(request)) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Invalid origin' },
      { 
        status: 403,
        headers: {
          'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
          'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
          'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
        }
      }
    );
  }

  const config = await getEdgeConfig();

  if (!checkRateLimit(clientIp, config.RATE_LIMIT!.maxRequests!, config.RATE_LIMIT!.windowMs!)) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Rate limit exceeded' },
      { 
        status: 429,
        headers: {
          'Retry-After': String(Math.ceil(config.RATE_LIMIT!.windowMs! / 1000)),
          'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
          'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
          'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
        }
      }
    );
  }

  const requestApiKey = request.headers.get('x-api-key');
  
  if (requestApiKey !== config.API_KEY) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Unauthorized' },
      { 
        status: 401,
        headers: {
          'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
          'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
          'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
        }
      }
    );
  }

  const maskedConfig = maskSensitiveData(config);

  return NextResponse.json(
    {
      success: true,
      config: maskedConfig,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      ip: clientIp,
    },
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Cache-Control': 'private, no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate',
        'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
        'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
        'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
        'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains',
      },
    }
  );
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};
